parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_embeddings (source_type, source_id, source_title, chunk_text, chunk_index, metadata, embedding) VALUES ('{{ $json.source_type }}', '{{ $json.source_id }}', '{{ $json.source_title }}', '{{ $json.chunk_text }}', {{ $json.chunk_index }}, '{{ $json.metadata }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.embedding }}'::vector) ON CONFLICT (source_type, source_id, chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET chunk_text = EXCLUDED.chunk_text, embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id
